findings.description: The source includes a concrete log output example showing what the failure notification log looks like when a message cannot be retrieved (メッセージが見つからない場合の障害通知ログの出力例). This example is omitted from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: 2011-02-23 18:23:45.680 -FATAL- usr_id = [9999999999] fail_code = [AP112233] failed to get the message to output the failure log. failureCode = [AP112233]

findings.location: s2 (障害ログの出力方針) — hints
findings.description: `BasicLogFormatter` is a class referenced in the log.properties configuration example in s2 (as `nablarch.core.log.basic.BasicLogFormatter`) but is absent from the hints array.

findings.location: s5 (障害ログの設定方法) — hints
findings.description: Three property names present in the app-log.properties configuration table and example are missing from the hints array: `language`, `derivedRequestIdPropName`, `derivedUserIdPropName`.
